headline: Equity Residential (NYSE:EQR) Reports Mixed Q2 Results, Strong NFFO Beat Overshadowed by Revenue Miss and Merger Uncertainty
summary: Equity Residential (EQR) beat Q2 2026 core earnings estimates with $1.02 NFFO per share, but revenue missed at $785M. GAAP EPS fell 40% YoY. The company raised same-store guidance but withdrew full-year forecasts due to the pending AvalonBay merger.

headline: Equity Residential Reports Second Quarter 2026 Results
summary: CHICAGO, July 22, 2026--Equity Residential (NYSE: EQR) today reported results for the quarter and six months ended June 30, 2026 and has posted a Q2 2026 Management Presentation to its website as referenced below.
